text:
ighatis multiplied by four and divided by nine.
The remainder gives the constellation at birth.
(ii) Birth Vighatis multiplied by three and divided by seven.
The remainder gives the weekday of birth.
In all the three tables the times of birth are at intervals of
63 Vighatis. Divide the birth ghatis by 63. Take the remain
der. See whether it fits into any of the following. Otherwise
make necessary adjustments. -
(A) First the method of Uttara Kalamrita. We are giving
the frrst unit which shows agreement of the Nakshatra and
the weekday. The nakshatras are given numerals I to 27,
starting from Asvini and ending with Revati. The timings are
in Vighatis.
